name: PrtCodeBlock
description: Atomic, tree-shakeable code block: zero-dep styled wrapper + an OPTIONAL copied lib/highlight.ts Shiki singleton (fine-grained core + JS regex engine, no WASM). Dual-theme via --shiki-* vars flipped by data-mode (zero re-render, no !important). Unused = zero highlighter bytes; used = one lazy chunk. Leaf component — nothing else may import it.
